overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game featuring the character in a blue and red hoodie suit walking through a wet urban city environment. The character navigates sidewalks and crosswalks with moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles on overcast autumn streets with fallen leaves.

events.description: character steps from crosswalk onto the sidewalk
pedestrians walk past the character in opposing directions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, navigating through scattered pedestrians on a wet autumn day

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with large windows lining the right side of the street
modern grey stone office building with dark windows on the left side
painted white zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt street
deciduous trees with autumn foliage planted along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wet city street and transitions onto a concrete sidewalk lined with a red brick building on the right and a modern office building on the left. Pedestrians walk in various directions as the camera follows the character's steady walking pace through the urban environment.

events.description: character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians
character turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with dark glass facade rising in the center background
red brick apartment building with fire escapes on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a city intersection with white crosswalk lines, moving from one sidewalk to another. A modern glass tower dominates the center background while a red apartment building lines the right side. A silver sedan drives past on the left as the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic.

events.description: character waits at curb for grey van to pass before crossing
character crosses the street as traffic clears

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner then crossing the road as a van passes by, continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: grey van approaching the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: large red brick industrial building with minimal windows on the right side
building with distinctive yellow trim and dark facade on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street crossing where a grey van is approaching. After waiting briefly, the character crosses the wet asphalt street. A red industrial building dominates the right side while a building with yellow trim appears on the left. Pedestrians are scattered along the sidewalks.

events.description: character crosses the street in front of a waiting blue sedan
character walks past the blue car and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection in front of a stopped blue sedan, then continuing along the sidewalk past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blue sedan stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians to pass

entered.detail: modern blue sedan with headlights on stopped at the crosswalk
contemporary building with reflective glass windows on the left side
dark recessed entrance to a building with overhead cover

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection where a blue sedan waits at the crosswalk. After crossing, the character walks along the sidewalk past a modern glass building on the left and approaches a dark building entrance. The wet pavement reflects the overcast sky as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the moderate crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet urban district as the character navigates a series of busy intersections and contrasting architectural styles. It begins with the character crossing a damp street and stepping onto a sidewalk flanked by a red brick building and a modern office. As the camera maintains a steady pace, the scene shifts through a city intersection dominated by a central glass tower and a red apartment building, with a silver sedan passing by. The movement then carries the character across another stretch of wet asphalt past a red industrial building and a structure with yellow trim, before turning toward a final busy crossing where a blue sedan waits. Finally, the camera follows the character past a modern glass facade toward a dark building entrance, with the overcast sky reflecting off the shimmering pavement.
